setupStatus.title: Spiegel-Setup-Status
setupStatus.notProbedYet: Es wurde noch keine Prüfung ausgeführt — klicken Sie auf Aktualisieren, um diesen Host zu prüfen.
setupStatus.notReady: Erforderliches Tooling für {{pm}} fehlt — bitte vor dem Auslösen einer Synchronisierung installieren.
setupStatus.subtitle: Auf diesem Host erforderliches Tooling zum Ausführen von {{pm}}-Mirror-Plänen
setupStatus.timedOut: [TODO] Agent did not respond within {{minutes}} minutes. The most likely causes are: the agent crashed mid-plan, the WebSocket dropped before the command_result was sent, or the agent silently de-duplicated the command without emitting a result. Check the agent log on this host and consider restarting the sysmanage-agent service. Click Refresh / Install Tools again to retry — the in-flight marker will be cleared and a fresh attempt dispatched.

tooltip.not_transferred: These fixes are not yet on the local mirror. Closing the gap requires another collector → media → repository transfer cycle.
tooltip.not_applied: These fixes are already on the local mirror. No new media transfer needed — the host just has not run its package manager yet.
tooltip.current: Host packages match the most recent mirror state and no public CVE has surfaced since the last transfer.

airgapBundles.dockerNoGroup: [TODO] Docker is running but the {{user}} user is not in the docker group, so the build subprocess cannot reach the daemon socket.
airgapBundles.dockerNotInstalled: [TODO] Docker is not installed on this server. Bundle builds need Docker to fetch per-distro Linux packages.
airgapBundles.dockerNotRunning: [TODO] Docker is installed but the daemon is not reachable. Start it with: sudo systemctl enable --now docker.
airgapBundles.dockerPermissionDenied: [TODO] The Docker daemon is running but the {{user}} user (the one running this sysmanage process) cannot read /var/run/docker.sock. Add the user to the docker group, then restart the sysmanage process so the new group set takes effect.
airgapBundles.dockerReadyHint: [TODO] Builds typically take 5-30 minutes depending on how many platforms are enabled.
airgapBundles.empty: [TODO] No bundles yet. Click a build button above to create one.
airgapBundles.requiresDocker: [TODO] Bundle builds require Docker to be installed and running on this server — needed to fetch per-distro Linux packages. Builds typically take 5-30 minutes depending on how many platforms are enabled.
airgapBundles.subtitle: [TODO] Generate a multi-OS ISO containing sysmanage server or agent + all per-platform dependencies, ready to mount on an air-gapped host.
airgapBundles.title: [TODO] Air-Gap Install Bundles
airgapBundles.resourcesInsufficient: [TODO] This server does not have enough free memory or disk to build a Server or Agent bundle — those buttons are disabled until resources are freed (add swap or grow the VM).
airgapBundles.resourcesLow: [TODO] Low resources — the build can run but will lean on swap and may be slow.

serverRole.loadError: Could not load the current server role.
serverRole.saveError: Could not save the server role.

standard.title: Standard (no air gap)
standard.description: The default. This server manages hosts directly over the network with no air-gap separation. Choose this for any ordinary deployment — it is what every server runs as unless you specifically need one half of an air-gapped pair.

collector.title: Air-Gap Collector (online side)
collector.description: The internet-connected half of an air-gap pair. It mirrors upstream package repositories, gathers CVE and compliance feeds, and bundles them into signed ISO images that you physically carry across the air gap. Choose this on the server that has internet access and builds the media.

repository.title: Air-Gap Repository (disconnected side)
repository.description: The isolated half of an air-gap pair, with no internet access. It ingests the ISO media produced by the Collector, verifies its signature, and serves the packages to managed hosts on the private network so they can update normally. Choose this on the server inside the air-gapped enclave.

serverRole.heading: Server Role
serverRole.intro: Choose how this SysManage server participates in an air-gapped deployment. Most servers should stay on Standard. The role takes effect after the next server restart.
serverRole.restartHint: Restart the SysManage server after saving for the new role to take full effect.
serverRole.saved: Server role saved. Restart the server for it to take full effect.
